title: SCALGO Live Workshop 2026
venue: Seminar Hall, Department of Civil Engineering, IIT (BHU), Varanasi
organizerFull: Smart Laboratory on Clean Rivers (SLCR), Department of Civil Engineering, IIT (BHU), Varanasi
description: A one-day workshop on SCALGO Live organized by the Smart Laboratory on Clean Rivers (SLCR), Department of Civil Engineering, IIT (BHU), Varanasi. This program is intended for officials, engineers, planners, researchers, faculty members, students, and professionals working in water resources, urban planning, rural development, drainage, GIS, environment, and disaster management.
